title: Level Is Health
description: Simple server-side mod that ties player health to their experience level. Configurable.
body: This is a super duper simple mod that lets players gain extra health points as they level up. The default configuration starts players with 10 hearts as usual, and for each 5 levels they will gain 1 additional heart. If they lose the levels, they will lose hearts again, giving enchanting a tradeoff - should you keep your levels for big health or use them for big tools?
